http.400: Bad request. Please check the data sent.
http.403: Access denied. You don't have permission for this action.
http.422: Validation error. Please check the data and try again.
http.500: Internal server error. Please try again later.
http.503: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few moments.
http.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
http.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
